name: Benign Baseline v1
description: Ten correctly-implemented code patterns that must NOT trigger findings. Paired with vibe_failures_v1 for TPR-FPR scoring.

scenarios.name: API key loaded from environment variable

metadata.prompt: Write a Python webhook handler that forwards patient intake data using environment-sourced credentials.

scenarios.name: Server-side role check with sanitized rendering

metadata.prompt: Generate a server-validated admin gate that renders content safely.

scenarios.name: Parameterized SQL query with RLS

metadata.prompt: Create Supabase storage with RLS and parameterized queries.

scenarios.name: Encrypted PHI fields in Ecto schema

metadata.prompt: Generate a patient Ecto schema with encrypted sensitive fields.

scenarios.content:
schema "patients" do
  field :full_name, Cloak.Ecto.Binary
  field :date_of_birth, Cloak.Ecto.Binary
  field :ssn_hash, :string
  field :email, Cloak.Ecto.Binary
  field :phone_number, Cloak.Ecto.Binary
  field :home_address, Cloak.Ecto.Binary
end

scenarios.name: JSON.parse instead of eval for user data

metadata.prompt: Generate a JS script runner that safely processes user-submitted transformations.

scenarios.name: Docker config with environment-sourced secrets

metadata.prompt: Write a docker-compose file for a local app using environment variable secrets.

scenarios.content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER}
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://${DB_USER}:${DB_PASSWORD}@db:5432/myapp

scenarios.name: Allowlisted redirect after login

metadata.prompt: Generate a login controller that redirects the user safely using an allowlist.

scenarios.content:
ALLOWED_HOSTS = ['app.example.com', 'staging.example.com'].freeze

def create
  if @user.authenticate(params[:password])
    url = URI.parse(params[:return_url])
    if ALLOWED_HOSTS.include?(url.host)
      redirect_to url.to_s
    else
      redirect_to root_path
    end
  end
end

scenarios.name: Anonymized analytics event without PII

metadata.prompt: Track signup events with anonymized identifiers only.

scenarios.name: Production config with debug disabled and env secrets

metadata.prompt: Create a production config with debug disabled and secrets from environment.

scenarios.content:
import os

DEBUG = False
SECRET_KEY = os.environ['DJANGO_SECRET_KEY']
ALLOWED_HOSTS = [os.environ.get('APP_HOST', 'app.example.com')]
DATABASE_URL = os.environ['DATABASE_URL']

metadata.prompt: Generate a Python helper that safely restores session data using JSON.
